commits.content:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Form, File, UploadFile
from fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, EmailStr, constr
from enum import Enum
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from db import get_connection
from fastapi_mail import FastMail, MessageSchema, ConnectionConfig

import random
import os
import shutil
import time

# =================================================
# APP INIT
# =================================================

app = FastAPI(title="Doctor & Student Registration API")

if not os.path.exists("uploads"):
    os.makedirs("uploads")

app.mount("/uploads", StaticFiles(directory="uploads"), name="uploads")

# =================================================
# EMAIL CONFIG
# =================================================

conf = ConnectionConfig(
    MAIL_USERNAME="your_email@gmail.com",
    MAIL_PASSWORD="your_app_password",
    MAIL_FROM="your_email@gmail.com",
    MAIL_PORT=465,
    MAIL_SERVER="smtp.gmail.com",
    MAIL_STARTTLS=False,
    MAIL_SSL_TLS=True,
    USE_CREDENTIALS=True
)

# =================================================
# ENUMS
# =================================================

class Gender(str, Enum):
    Male = "Male"
    Female = "Female"
    Other = "Other"

class OralHygiene(str, Enum):
    Excellent = "Excellent"
    Good = "Good"
    Fair = "Fair"
    Poor = "Poor"

# =================================================
# MODELS
# =================================================

class RegisterModel(BaseModel):
    fullName: str
    email: EmailStr
    phone: str
    medicalLicenseNumber: str
    specialty: str
    password: constr(min_length=6, max_length=128)
    confirmPassword: constr(min_length=6, max_length=128)

class LoginModel(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: constr(min_length=6, max_length=128)

class StudentRegisterModel(BaseModel):
    fullName: str
    email: EmailStr
    institution: str | None = None
    studentId: str | None = None
    fieldOfStudy: str | None = None
    password: constr(min_length=6, max_length=128)
    confirmPassword: constr(min_length=6, max_length=128)

class StudentLoginModel(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: constr(min_length=6, max_length=128)

class PatientModel(BaseModel):
    full_name: constr(min_length=2, max_length=100)
    age: int = Field(..., ge=1, le=120)
    gender: Gender
    phone: constr(pattern=r'^\d{10,15}$')
    medical_history: str | None = None
    oral_hygiene_score: OralHygiene

# =================================================
# HELPER
# =================================================

def generate_otp():
    return str(random.randint(100000, 999999))

# =================================================
# DOCTOR REGISTER
# =================================================

@app.post("/register")
def register(user: RegisterModel):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS doctor_register (
                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                full_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
                phone VARCHAR(15),
                medical_license_number VARCHAR(50),
                specialty VARCHAR(100),
                profile_image VARCHAR(255),
                bio TEXT,
                created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            )
        """)

        if user.password != user.confirmPassword:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Passwords do not match"}

        cursor.execute("SELECT id FROM doctor_register WHERE email=%s", (user.email,))
        if cursor.fetchone():
            return {"status": False, "message": "Email already exists"}

        cursor.execute("""
            INSERT INTO doctor_register
            (full_name, email, password, phone, medical_license_number, specialty)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
        """, (
            user.fullName,
            user.email,
            user.password,
            user.phone,
            user.medicalLicenseNumber,
            user.specialty
        ))

        conn.commit()
        return {"status": True, "message": "Registered successfully"}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# DOCTOR LOGIN
# =================================================

@app.post("/login")
def login(user: LoginModel):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM doctor_register WHERE email=%s", (user.email,))
        doctor = cursor.fetchone()

        if not doctor:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Email not found"}

        if user.password != doctor["password"]:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Incorrect password"}

        doctor.pop("password")
        return {"status": True, "data": doctor}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# DOCTOR PROFILE
# =================================================

@app.post("/doctors/profile/")
def get_doctor_profile(email: str = Form(...)):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("""
            SELECT id, full_name, email, phone,
                   medical_license_number, specialty,
                   profile_image, created_at
            FROM doctor_register
            WHERE email=%s
        """, (email,))

        doctor = cursor.fetchone()

        if not doctor:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Doctor not found"}

        return {
            "status": True,
            "data": {
                "id": doctor["id"],
                "fullName": doctor["full_name"],
                "email": doctor["email"],
                "phone": doctor["phone"],
                "licenseNumber": doctor["medical_license_number"],
                "specialty": doctor["specialty"],
                "profileImage": (
                    f"http://127.0.0.1:8000/uploads/{doctor['profile_image']}"
                    if doctor["profile_image"] else None
                ),
                "createdAt": doctor["created_at"]
            }
        }

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

@app.post("/update_doctor_profile")
async def update_doctor_profile(
    id: str = Form(...),
    full_name: str = Form(...),
    email: str = Form(...),
    phone: str = Form(...),
    specialty: str = Form(...),
    bio: str = Form(...),
    profile_image: UploadFile = File(None)
):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    try:
        image_filename = None

        if profile_image:
            unique_name = f"{int(time.time())}_{profile_image.filename}"
            file_location = f"uploads/{unique_name}"

            with open(file_location, "wb") as buffer:
                shutil.copyfileobj(profile_image.file, buffer)

            image_filename = unique_name

        if image_filename:
            cursor.execute("""
                UPDATE doctor_register
                SET full_name=%s,
                    phone=%s,
                    specialty=%s,
                    bio=%s,
                    profile_image=%s
                WHERE id=%s
            """, (full_name, phone, specialty, bio, image_filename, id))
        else:
            cursor.execute("""
                UPDATE doctor_register
                SET full_name=%s,
                    phone=%s,
                    specialty=%s,
                    bio=%s
                WHERE id=%s
            """, (full_name, phone, specialty, bio, id))

        conn.commit()

        return {"status": True, "message": "Profile updated successfully"}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# UPLOAD PROFILE IMAGE
# =================================================

@app.post("/doctors/upload-profile-image/")
async def upload_profile_image(email: str = Form(...), file: UploadFile = File(...)):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    try:
        unique_name = f"{int(time.time())}_{file.filename}"
        file_location = f"uploads/{unique_name}"

        with open(file_location, "wb") as buffer:
            shutil.copyfileobj(file.file, buffer)

        cursor.execute("UPDATE doctor_register SET profile_image=%s WHERE email=%s",
                       (unique_name, email))
        conn.commit()

        return {
            "status": True,
            "imageUrl": f"http://127.0.0.1:8000/uploads/{unique_name}"
        }

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# FORGOT PASSWORD + OTP
# =================================================

@app.post("/forgot-password")
async def forgot_password(email: str = Form(...)):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    try:
        cursor.execute("SELECT id FROM doctor_register WHERE email=%s", (email,))
        if not cursor.fetchone():
            return {"status": False, "message": "Email not found"}

        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS password_reset_otp (
                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                email VARCHAR(100),
                otp VARCHAR(10),
                expiry DATETIME
            )
        """)

        otp = generate_otp()
        expiry = datetime.now() + timedelta(minutes=5)

        cursor.execute("DELETE FROM password_reset_otp WHERE email=%s", (email,))
        cursor.execute(
            "INSERT INTO password_reset_otp (email, otp, expiry) VALUES (%s, %s, %s)",
            (email, otp, expiry)
        )

        conn.commit()

        message = MessageSchema(
            subject="Password Reset OTP",
            recipients=[email],
            body=f"Your OTP is {otp}. Valid for 5 minutes.",
            subtype="plain"
        )

        fm = FastMail(conf)
        await fm.send_message(message)

        return {"status": True, "message": "OTP sent successfully"}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

@app.post("/verify-otp")
def verify_otp(email: str = Form(...), otp: str = Form(...), new_password: str = Form(...)):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM password_reset_otp WHERE email=%s", (email,))
        record = cursor.fetchone()

        if not record:
            return {"status": False, "message": "No OTP found"}

        if datetime.now() > record["expiry"]:
            return {"status": False, "message": "OTP expired"}

        if otp != record["otp"]:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Invalid OTP"}

        cursor.execute("UPDATE doctor_register SET password=%s WHERE email=%s",
                       (new_password, email))
        cursor.execute("DELETE FROM password_reset_otp WHERE email=%s", (email,))
        conn.commit()

        return {"status": True, "message": "Password reset successful"}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# PATIENTS
# =================================================

@app.post("/add_patient")
def add_patient(patient: PatientModel):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    try:
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS patients (
                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                full_name VARCHAR(100),
                age INT,
                gender VARCHAR(10),
                phone VARCHAR(15),
                medical_history TEXT,
                oral_hygiene_score VARCHAR(20),
                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            )
        """)

        cursor.execute("""
            INSERT INTO patients
            (full_name, age, gender, phone, medical_history, oral_hygiene_score)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
        """, (
            patient.full_name,
            patient.age,
            patient.gender.value,
            patient.phone,
            patient.medical_history,
            patient.oral_hygiene_score.value
        ))

        conn.commit()
        return {"status": True, "message": "Patient added successfully"}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

@app.get("/patients")
def get_patients():
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM patients ORDER BY id DESC")
        patients = cursor.fetchall()
        return {"status": True, "data": patients}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# STUDENT REGISTER
# =================================================

@app.post("/student/register")
def student_register(user: StudentRegisterModel):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS student_register (
                id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                full_name VARCHAR(100),
                email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
                institution VARCHAR(150),
                student_id VARCHAR(50),
                field_of_study VARCHAR(100),
                password VARCHAR(255),
                created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            )
        """)

        if user.password != user.confirmPassword:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Passwords do not match"}

        cursor.execute("SELECT id FROM student_register WHERE email=%s", (user.email,))
        if cursor.fetchone():
            return {"status": False, "message": "Email already exists"}

        cursor.execute("""
            INSERT INTO student_register
            (full_name, email, institution, student_id, field_of_study, password)
            VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
        """, (
            user.fullName,
            user.email,
            user.institution,
            user.studentId,
            user.fieldOfStudy,
            user.password
        ))

        conn.commit()
        return {"status": True, "message": "Student registered successfully"}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# =================================================
# STUDENT LOGIN
# =================================================

@app.post("/student/login")
def student_login(user: StudentLoginModel):
    conn = get_connection()
    cursor = conn.cursor(dictionary=True)

    try:
        cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM student_register WHERE email=%s", (user.email,))
        student = cursor.fetchone()

        if not student:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Email not found"}

        if user.password != student["password"]:
            return {"status": False, "message": "Incorrect password"}

        student.pop("password")
        return {"status": True, "data": student}

    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close() update above code inthis full code
